plannedChanges.roomSizeChange: Increase minimum room dimensions from compact 3-5 cell rooms to 7-11 cell rooms so first-person movement has lateral exploration space.
plannedChanges.corridorWidthChange: Carve corridors with a 3x3 brush around the path centerline, reducing narrow one-cell passage pressure.
plannedChanges.wallHeightChange: Raise generated walls to 3.2 world units, above player and camera height, to strengthen dungeon enclosure.
plannedChanges.propPlacementAlgorithm: Place primitive crate, shelf, barrel, broken pillar, debris pile, and storage rack props inside room interior cells. Exclude player start, target cells, target-adjacent cells, and corridor cells.
plannedChanges.propValidation: Record prop count, prop types, duplicate prop cells, doorway/corridor blocking, target-adjacent blocking, and post-prop target reachability.
plannedChanges.targetClearanceValidation: Require target min distance >= 7, targetInteractionClearancePassed=true, targetReachabilityPassed=true, and reachableTargetCount=3 for seeds 1001, 2026, and 7777.

expectedRisks: Large room placement can fail on small grids; fallback rooms remain defined at expanded sizes.
Props may visually obstruct targets too strongly; validation avoids blocking target-adjacent cells but human review remains separate.
Scene rebuild through Unity Bridge may require domain reload recovery if Unity recompiles scripts.
